message:
Update README to match new landing page copy

files.patch:
@@ -5,8 +5,8 @@

AgentLogs

- Open-source observability for AI coding agents.
- See what prompts work, learn from each other's workflows, and link sessions to commits. + Coding agents, visible to your team.
+ Open-source and self-hostable. Track sessions, share prompts, and link every conversation to the commit it produced.
